blockingIssues.description: RuntimeConfiguration.parseBaseUrl accepts malformed hostless HTTP(S) URLs such as `https:/demo.example.test`, so invalid base URL configuration can bypass the intended fail-fast diagnostic and fail later during navigation.

PlaywrightRuntime always creates the BrowserContext before OIDC bootstrap runs, and the saved-session contract only supports local-storage seeding, so shared core OIDC handlers cannot represent session reuse cases that need cookies or storage state at context-creation time.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a .factory/library entry documenting the new public runtime/auth/reporting APIs introduced by core-runtime-primitives.
rejectedObservations.reason: Deferred during scrutiny because the code and review artifacts already identify the relevant APIs, and this validation pass did not need an additional shared-state update to triage the milestone.
